first_patient_message: I would like to check all my current appointments
known_appointments: The patient does not know the exact appointment dates or times and wants the agent to check all appointments on file.
scenario_instructions: If the reason for cancel is accepted, question why they aren't worried about it
If the reason for cancel isn't accepted, change the real reason as family emergency and pass off the previous one as a joke
After cancellation ask double check for any existing appointments
Do not ask about parking, elevator access, appointment preparation, or scheduling a new appointment in this scenario.
